creator: nbaltunian@gmail.com
text:
posixshmcontrol(1) says 'The posixshmcontrol command appeared in FreeBSD 13.0'.

The release notes for FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE are here: https://www.freebsd.org/releases/12.1R/relnotes.html

In the release notes, we find this:
> 4.2 Userland Application Changes
> ...
> The posixshmcontrol(1) utility has been added. [r348426]

The source path to the manpage is `usr.bin/posixshmcontrol/posixshmcontrol.1'.

I can get a patch for this in later.
